Introduction: A New Era for JETOUR at Auto China 2026

The global automotive landscape is shifting rapidly, driven by evolving consumer demands for lifestyle-centric mobility and advanced electrification. At the forefront of this transformation is JETOUR, a brand that has redefined success through its unique Travel⁺ strategy. During the highly anticipated Auto China 2026 exhibition in Beijing, JETOUR made headlines not just with new vehicles, but with a comprehensive display of its dual-brand architecture. This strategic move signals a mature phase in the company’s development, aiming to cater to diverse market segments while maintaining a core commitment to adventure and exploration.

The atmosphere at the JETOUR booth was electric, reflecting the brand’s momentum as one of the fastest-growing automotive names globally. By leveraging the massive platform of Auto China 2026, JETOUR demonstrated how its dual-brand approach allows for specialized focus without diluting its core identity. The event served as a testament to the brand’s ability to innovate in design, powertrain technology, and ecosystem integration, setting a new benchmark for what a travel-focused automotive brand can achieve in the modern era.

The Evolution of the Travel⁺ Strategy

Since its inception, the Travel⁺ strategy has been the North Star guiding JETOUR’s product development and brand philosophy. Unlike traditional automakers that focus solely on transportation from point A to point B, JETOUR emphasizes the journey itself. This philosophy integrates vehicle manufacturing with travel ecology, creating a seamless experience for users who value exploration. At Auto China 2026, this strategy was not just a slogan; it was the architectural foundation of the entire showcase.

The evolution of this strategy is evident in the sophisticated ecosystem surrounding the vehicles. JETOUR has moved beyond simply building rugged SUVs. They have created a holistic environment that includes smart travel services, community building, and partnerships with camping and outdoor gear providers. The Travel⁺ ecosystem ensures that owning a JETOUR vehicle provides access to a broader lifestyle network. This approach resonates deeply with modern consumers who seek experiences rather than just possessions. The brand’s ability to pivot and expand this strategy to include new energy vehicles and smart connectivity features demonstrates its agility and forward-thinking vision.

Dual Brands, One Vision: Decoding the Architecture

The centerpiece of JETOUR’s presentation at Auto China 2026 was the clear delineation and simultaneous showcasing of its dual-brand structure. This strategic decision allows the company to address different consumer psychographics while leveraging shared technological strengths.
